productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Tropi Cat Red White Flip Flop
description: Look cool on the beach in this pair of graphic red and white flip-flops from the puma Tropical series. The red and white canvas straps ensure that the pair fits snugly around your feet, while the cushioned insole gives hours of comfort in great style. The white outsole with subtle grooves enhances grip, making it a great addition to the wardrobe.Upper Canvas thong straps with canvas toe separator for maximum comfortEmbroidered puma cat logo on the strap Midsole Graphic prints on insoleSoft insole for comfort Outsole Rubber outsole multi directional patterns for superior gripThong straps attached to the outsole for extended durability shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
